description_long: This bungalow features a low, rectangular profile with a broad, flat green roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a central entrance flanked by two large trees and several windows, providing a welcoming appearance. A long, narrow driveway or path extends from the front, leading up to the entrance. The landscaping includes a few additional trees and shrubs, mainly concentrated near the front and side of the building. The structure appears to be single-story, with a simple, modern design and minimal ornamentation. The windows are arranged in a linear fashion, and the overall look is clean and functional.
description: A single-story, modern bungalow with a flat green roof, white walls, a central entrance, and a long driveway, surrounded by a few trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: The left side of the bungalow is visible, showing the flat green roof, white walls, and a portion of the driveway with trees near the entrance.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the central entrance, two large trees, several windows, and the full length of the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_2: The right side of the bungalow is shown, with the driveway extending out and a few trees and shrubs visible near the building.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the bungalow, mostly showing the green roof and minimal landscaping, with the driveway and trees in the background.
